text_block_list.name: Dober's Friend
text_block_list.text:
By the way, I heard a teen magazine is coming to
do a story on the academy soon.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Friend
text_block_list.text:
You must've seen the articles before, right? They
sometimes publish stories on Tracen students and
stuff.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Friend
text_block_list.text:
A while ago, they featured me running in a
magazine spread, and I was sooo happy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: A whole spread?! In a teen magazine?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
choice_data_list: Why are you hiding behind me?
Why are you hiding behind me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-I'm not hiding! I just happened to be here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to be featured in a magazine
spread...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after being called out, Mejiro Dober
continues to act strangely, and she does rather
poorly during our training session...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after being called out, Mejiro Dober
continues to act strangely, and she does rather
poorly during our training session...
